1.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Atiyyah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to them while washing his daughter: "Begin with her right side and the areas of ablution."
1.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Atiyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda kepada mereka saat memandikan putrinya: "Mulailah dari sisi kanannya dan anggota-anggota wudhunya."

2.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Atiyyah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "We were forbidden from following funeral processions, though it was not made strictly obligatory upon us."
2.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Atiyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kami dilarang mengikuti iringan jenazah, namun hal itu tidak diwajibkan atas kami."

3.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Atiyyah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "No mourning is to be observed for a deceased person for more than three days, except for a woman mourning her husband — she mourns for four months and ten days. She shall not wear dyed garments except striped cloth, nor apply kohl, nor use perfume except for a slight amount of qust and adhfar at the very beginning of her purity."
3.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Atiyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak boleh berkabung atas orang yang meninggal lebih dari tiga hari, kecuali seorang wanita yang berkabung atas suaminya — ia berkabung selama empat bulan sepuluh hari. Ia tidak boleh mengenakan pakaian yang diwarnai kecuali kain bergaris, tidak boleh memakai celak, tidak boleh memakai wewangian kecuali sedikit qust dan adhfar di awal masa sucinya."

4.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Atiyyah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ took a pledge from us in the pledge of allegiance that we would not wail. None of us fulfilled it except five: Umm Sulaym, the wife of Mu'adh, the daughter of Abu Sabra, and another woman."
4.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Atiyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ mengambil janji dari kami dalam bai'at bahwa kami tidak akan meratap. Tidak ada seorang pun dari kami yang menepatinya kecuali lima orang: Umm Sulaym, istri Mu'adz, putri Abu Sabrah, dan seorang wanita lain."

5.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Atiyyah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Prophet ﷺ said to us: 'Place camphor or something of camphor in the last washing.' When we finished, he told us to inform him. He then threw his lower garment to us and said: 'Wrap her in it close to her body.' Umm Atiyyah said: 'We plaited the hair of the daughter of the Prophet ﷺ into three braids and placed them behind her — the two side braids and the front braid.'"
5.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Atiyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Nabi ﷺ bersabda kepada kami: 'Letakkan kapur barus atau sesuatu dari kapur barus pada cucian terakhir.' Ketika kami selesai, kami memberitahu beliau. Beliau lalu melemparkan sarungnya kepada kami dan bersabda: 'Balutkan padanya sebagai pakaian terdalam.' Umm Atiyyah berkata: 'Kami mengepang rambut putri Nabi ﷺ menjadi tiga kepang dan meletakkannya di belakang — dua kepang samping dan satu kepang depan.'"

6.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Atiyyah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I said: 'I will not give you the pledge of allegiance until I go and help her as she helped me.' So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ agreed to that, and I went and helped her, then returned and gave the pledge of allegiance to the Prophet ﷺ." Umm Atiyyah said: "None of us fulfilled it except that woman and Umm Sulaym bint Milhan."
6.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Atiyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku berkata: 'Aku tidak akan berbai'at kepadamu sampai aku pergi dan membantu wanita itu sebagaimana ia pernah membantuku.' Maka Rasulullah ﷺ menyetujui itu, dan aku pergi membantunya, kemudian kembali dan berbai'at kepada Nabi ﷺ." Umm Atiyyah berkata: "Tidak ada seorang pun dari kami yang menepatinya kecuali wanita itu dan Umm Sulaym bint Milhan."

7.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Atiyyah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ took a pledge from the women, among which was that they would not wail. A woman said: 'O Messenger of Allah, a woman helped me in mourning — shall I not help her?' The Prophet ﷺ withdrew his hand and did not accept her pledge."
7.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Atiyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ mengambil janji dari para wanita, di antaranya adalah bahwa mereka tidak akan meratap. Seorang wanita berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, seorang wanita telah membantuku dalam berkabung — apakah aku tidak boleh membantunya?' Nabi ﷺ menarik tangannya dan tidak menerima bai'atnya."

8.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Atiyyah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Prophet ﷺ pledged with us that we would not kill our children, nor make false accusations with our own hands and feet, nor disobey him in what is right. We said yes. Umar extended his hand from outside the door and we extended our hands from inside. Then he said: 'O Allah, bear witness.' And we were commanded to go out for the two Eid prayers — the free women and the menstruating women — and were forbidden from following funeral processions. There is no Jumu'ah prayer upon us."
8.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Atiyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Nabi ﷺ mengambil janji dari kami bahwa kami tidak akan membunuh anak-anak kami, tidak membuat tuduhan palsu, dan tidak mendurhakai beliau dalam kebaikan. Kami berkata ya. Umar mengulurkan tangannya dari luar pintu dan kami mengulurkan tangan dari dalam. Kemudian ia berkata: 'Ya Allah, saksikanlah.' Kami diperintahkan untuk keluar pada dua shalat Ied — wanita merdeka maupun yang sedang haid — dan dilarang mengikuti iringan jenazah. Tidak ada kewajiban Jum'at atas kami."

9.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khawla bint Hakim (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "If any of you alights at a resting place and says: 'I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created,' nothing will harm him in that place until he departs from it."
9.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khawla binti Hakim (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Jika salah seorang dari kalian singgah di suatu tempat dan mengucapkan: 'Aku berlindung dengan kalimat-kalimat Allah yang sempurna dari kejahatan apa yang Dia ciptakan,' maka tidak ada sesuatu pun yang akan mencelakakannya di tempat itu hingga ia pergi darinya."

10.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khawla bint Hakim (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "There is no Muslim who alights at a resting place and says — when he alights — 'I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created' — three times, except that nothing evil in that resting place will harm him until he departs from it."
10.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khawla binti Hakim (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak ada seorang Muslim pun yang singgah di suatu tempat kemudian mengucapkan — ketika ia singgah — 'Aku berlindung dengan kalimat-kalimat Allah yang sempurna dari kejahatan apa yang Dia ciptakan' — tiga kali, kecuali tidak ada kejahatan di tempat itu yang akan mencelakakannya hingga ia pergi darinya."

11.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked the Prophet ﷺ about a woman who sees in her sleep what a man sees. He ﷺ said: "She does not need to perform ghusl unless fluid is discharged, just as a man does not need to perform ghusl unless fluid is discharged."
11.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang seorang wanita yang bermimpi seperti mimpi seorang laki-laki. Beliau ﷺ bersabda: "Ia tidak wajib mandi kecuali jika keluar cairan, sebagaimana seorang laki-laki tidak wajib mandi kecuali jika keluar cairan."

12.iwh_en: It was narrated that a woman who was one of the maternal aunts of the Prophet ﷺ asked him about a woman who has a wet dream. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "She must perform ghusl."
12.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang wanita yang merupakan salah satu bibi Nabi ﷺ bertanya kepada beliau tentang seorang wanita yang bermimpi basah. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Ia wajib mandi."

13.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man from the Companions said, while carrying his grandson: "By Allah, you are indeed cowardly and miserly — yet you are from the fragrance of Allah the Almighty. And the last strike that Allah struck was at Wajj." He also said: "You are indeed miserly and cowardly."
13.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat bahwa ia berkata sambil menggendong cucunya: "Demi Allah, sesungguhnya kalian pengecut dan kikir — namun kalian adalah dari wewangian Allah 'Azza wa Jalla. Dan pukulan terakhir yang Allah hantamkan adalah di Wajj." Ia juga berkata: "Sesungguhnya kalian kikir dan pengecut."

14.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khawla bint Hakim (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, do you have a Pool?' He said: 'Yes, and the most beloved of those who come to it to me are my people.'"
14.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khawla binti Hakim (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah engkau memiliki telaga?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, dan orang-orang yang paling aku cintai untuk mendatanginya adalah kaumku.'"

15.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khawla bint Hakim (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ mentioned that on the Day of Resurrection he would have a Pool stretching from such and such a place to such and such. She asked and he said: "Yes, and the people I most want to be quenched from it are my people." She then brought him a pot with some bread or porridge, and he put his hand in it to eat, but his fingers were burned. He said: "Alas!" Then he said: "O son of Adam — when cold strikes him he says 'alas,' and when heat strikes him he says 'alas.'"
15.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khawla binti Hakim (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyebutkan bahwa pada hari kiamat beliau akan memiliki telaga yang membentang dari sini ke sana. Ia bertanya dan beliau bersabda: "Ya, dan orang-orang yang paling aku inginkan untuk meminumnya adalah kaumku." Ia kemudian membawa periuk berisi roti atau bubur, dan beliau memasukkan tangannya ke dalamnya untuk makan, namun jari-jarinya terbakar. Beliau berkata: "Aduh!" Kemudian bersabda: "Wahai anak Adam — ketika dingin menimpanya ia berkata 'aduh,' dan ketika panas menimpanya ia berkata 'aduh.'"

16.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman who had been the wife of Hamza ibn Abd al-Muttalib (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered upon Hamza at his house, and they discussed worldly matters. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Indeed the world is green and sweet. Whoever takes it by right, Allah will bless him in it. But many a person plunges into the wealth of Allah and His Messenger — for him is the Fire on the Day he meets Allah."
16.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita yang pernah menjadi istri Hamzah bin Abdul Muthallib (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ masuk menemui Hamzah di rumahnya, dan mereka membicarakan urusan dunia. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Sesungguhnya dunia itu hijau dan manis. Barangsiapa mengambilnya dengan cara yang benar, Allah akan memberkatinya. Namun banyak orang yang menyelami harta Allah dan Rasul-Nya — baginya adalah Neraka pada hari ia bertemu Allah."

17.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khawla bint Thamer al-Ansariyya (may Allah be pleased with her) that she heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "Indeed the world is green and sweet, and there are men who plunge into the wealth of Allah the Almighty without right — for them is the Fire on the Day of Resurrection."
17.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khawla binti Thamer al-Anshariyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Sesungguhnya dunia itu hijau dan manis, dan ada laki-laki yang menyelami harta Allah 'Azza wa Jalla tanpa hak — bagi mereka adalah Neraka pada hari kiamat."

18.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khawla bint Tha'laba (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ was in a trance-like state and then it lifted from him. He said to her: "O Khuwaylah, Allah has revealed something regarding you and your companion." He then recited to her: "Indeed Allah has heard the words of she who disputes with you concerning her husband..." to "...and for the disbelievers there is a painful punishment." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ then said to her: "Tell him to free a slave." She said: "By Allah, O Messenger of Allah, he does not have anyone to free."
18.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khawla binti Tsa'labah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ berada dalam keadaan seperti trans kemudian sadar. Beliau berkata kepadanya: "Wahai Khuwailah, Allah telah menurunkan sesuatu berkenaan dengan kamu dan suamimu." Beliau kemudian membacakan kepadanya: "Sesungguhnya Allah telah mendengar perkataan wanita yang mendebatmu tentang suaminya..." hingga "...dan bagi orang-orang kafir ada azab yang pedih." Rasulullah ﷺ kemudian berkata kepadanya: "Perintahkan dia untuk memerdekakan budak." Ia berkata: "Demi Allah, ya Rasulullah, ia tidak memiliki siapapun untuk dimerdekakan."

19.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said to her: "Go to Ibn Umm Maktum, for he is a blind man. You may remove your outer garments in his presence. When your waiting period is over, inform me." She said: "Suitors came to me, among them Mu'awiya and Abu al-Jahm." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "As for Mu'awiya, he is poor and has no wealth. As for Abu al-Jahm, he beats women. But you should marry Usama ibn Zayd."
19.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda kepadanya: "Pergilah ke tempat Ibnu Umm Maktum, karena ia adalah seorang yang buta. Kamu boleh melepas pakaian luarmu di hadapannya. Ketika masa iddahmu selesai, beritahukan aku." Ia berkata: "Para pelamar datang kepadaku, di antaranya Mu'awiyah dan Abu al-Jahm." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Adapun Mu'awiyah, ia miskin dan tidak memiliki harta. Adapun Abu al-Jahm, ia memukul wanita. Tetapi nikahlah dengan Usamah bin Zaid."

20.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "My husband divorced me with a final divorce, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not grant me accommodation or maintenance."
20.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Suamiku menceraikanku dengan talak tiga, dan Rasulullah ﷺ tidak memberiku tempat tinggal maupun nafkah."

21.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that her husband divorced her with a triple divorce, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ordered her to spend her waiting period at the house of Ibn Umm Maktum.
21.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa suaminya menceraikannya dengan talak tiga, dan Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkannya untuk menjalani masa iddah di rumah Ibnu Umm Maktum.

22.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "As for Mu'awiya, he is a poor man with no wealth. As for Abu al-Jahm, he is a man who beats women. But Usama..." She indicated with her hand as if to say she did not want him. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: "Obeying Allah and obeying His Messenger is better for you." So she married him and was pleased with him.
22.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Adapun Mu'awiyah, ia adalah orang miskin yang tidak memiliki harta. Adapun Abu al-Jahm, ia adalah laki-laki yang memukul wanita. Tetapi Usamah..." Ia mengisyaratkan dengan tangannya seolah-olah tidak menginginkannya. Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: "Taat kepada Allah dan taat kepada Rasul-Nya lebih baik bagimu." Maka ia menikah dengannya dan merasa bahagia."

23.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ mentioned Medina and said: "It is Taybah."
23.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ menyebutkan Madinah dan bersabda: "Ia adalah Taybah."

24.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) from the Prophet ﷺ that he said regarding a woman who has been divorced with a triple divorce: "She is entitled to neither accommodation nor maintenance."
24.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda mengenai wanita yang diceraikan dengan talak tiga: "Ia tidak berhak mendapatkan tempat tinggal maupun nafkah."

25.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that Abu al-Jahm and Mu'awiya both proposed to her. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "As for Abu al-Jahm, he never puts down his staff. As for Mu'awiya, he is a poor man with no wealth. Marry Usama ibn Zayd."
25.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Abu al-Jahm dan Mu'awiyah keduanya melamarnya. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Adapun Abu al-Jahm, ia tidak pernah meletakkan tongkatnya. Adapun Mu'awiyah, ia adalah orang miskin yang tidak memiliki harta. Nikahilah Usamah bin Zaid."

26.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ did not grant her accommodation or maintenance. Umar ibn al-Khattab said: "We will not abandon the Book of Allah the Almighty and the Sunnah of His Prophet ﷺ for the statement of a woman — she may have forgotten. She is entitled to accommodation and maintenance."
26.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ tidak memberikannya tempat tinggal maupun nafkah. Umar bin al-Khattab berkata: "Kami tidak akan meninggalkan Kitab Allah 'Azza wa Jalla dan Sunnah Nabi-Nya ﷺ karena perkataan seorang wanita — mungkin ia lupa. Ia berhak mendapatkan tempat tinggal dan nafkah."

27.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not grant her accommodation or maintenance.
27.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ tidak memberikannya tempat tinggal maupun nafkah.

28.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) about her encounter with the Dajjal who said: "Is the Prophet ﷺ among you?" They said: "Yes." He said: "That is better for them." He asked: "What has Persia done — has he prevailed over it?" They said: "He has not yet prevailed over it." He said: "But he will prevail over it." Then he said: "What of the spring of Zughar?" They said: "It is overflowing." He said: "And the Sea of Tiberias — is it full?" They said: "It is overflowing." He said: "And the date palms of Baysan — do they bear fruit yet?" They said: "Yes, they are beginning to bear fruit."
28.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) tentang perjumpaannya dengan Dajjal yang berkata: "Apakah Nabi ﷺ ada di antara kalian?" Mereka berkata: "Ya." Ia berkata: "Itu lebih baik bagi mereka." Ia bertanya: "Apa yang terjadi dengan Persia — apakah beliau telah menaklukkannya?" Mereka berkata: "Beliau belum menaklukkannya." Ia berkata: "Tapi beliau akan menaklukkannya." Kemudian ia berkata: "Bagaimana mata air Zughar?" Mereka berkata: "Ia meluap penuh." Ia berkata: "Dan Danau Tiberias — apakah penuh?" Mereka berkata: "Ia meluap penuh." Ia berkata: "Dan pohon kurma Baysan — apakah sudah berbuah?" Mereka berkata: "Ya, mulai berbuah."

29.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that her husband sent her five measures of barley and five of dates as her maintenance. She brought this to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, who said: "He has told the truth." He then ordered her to spend her waiting period in the house of a certain person. Her divorce had been a final irrevocable one.
29.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa suaminya mengirimkan padanya lima mud gandum dan lima mud kurma sebagai nafkah. Ia membawa hal ini kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, yang bersabda: "Ia berkata benar." Beliau kemudian memerintahkannya untuk menjalani masa iddah di rumah seseorang. Cerainya adalah talak ba'in.

30.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "Go to Ibn Umm Maktum, for he is a man who has lost his sight. If you remove some of your clothing, he will not see anything." She said: "When I became free from my waiting period, Mu'awiya and Abu Jahm ibn Hudhayfa proposed to me." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "As for Mu'awiya, he is poor with no wealth. As for Abu Jahm, he is a man who never puts down his staff from his shoulder. What of Usama ibn Zayd?" Her family disliked that, but she said: "I will only marry the one the Messenger of Allah ﷺ directed me to."
30.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Pergilah ke tempat Ibnu Umm Maktum, karena ia adalah laki-laki yang telah kehilangan penglihatannya. Jika kamu melepas sebagian pakaianmu, ia tidak akan melihat apa pun." Ia berkata: "Ketika masa iddahku selesai, Mu'awiyah dan Abu Jahm bin Hudzaifah melamarku." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Adapun Mu'awiyah, ia miskin dan tidak memiliki harta. Adapun Abu Jahm, ia adalah laki-laki yang tidak pernah meletakkan tongkatnya dari bahunya. Bagaimana dengan Usamah bin Zaid?" Keluarganya tidak menyukai itu, namun ia berkata: "Aku hanya akan menikah dengan orang yang diarahkan Rasulullah ﷺ kepadaku."

31.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "There is no accommodation for you and there is no right of return for him over you. Your waiting period is upon you. Move to Umm Sharik, your cousin." Then he said: "No — that is a woman whom the Muslim brothers visit. Rather, move to Ibn Umm Maktum, your cousin, for he is blind. Stay with him, and when your waiting period is complete, do not commit yourself in marriage without informing me first." She said: "By Allah, I did not think at that time that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wanted me except for himself."
31.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak ada tempat tinggal untukmu dan tidak ada hak rujuk baginya atasmu. Masa iddahmu ada padamu. Pindahlah ke tempat Umm Syarik, sepupumu." Kemudian beliau bersabda: "Tidak — itu adalah seorang wanita yang sering dikunjungi oleh saudara-saudara Muslim. Pindahlah ke tempat Ibnu Umm Maktum, sepupumu, karena ia buta. Tinggallah bersamanya, dan ketika masa iddahmu selesai, jangan menikah tanpa memberitahuku terlebih dahulu." Ia berkata: "Demi Allah, aku tidak menyangka pada saat itu bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menginginkanku kecuali untuk dirinya sendiri."

32.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "Move to the house of Ibn Umm Maktum." He also mentioned Umm Kulthum. He said: "No — Umm Kulthum is visited by many. Rather, move to Abd Allah ibn Umm Maktum, for he is blind." So she moved to Abd Allah and completed her waiting period with him. Then Abu Jahm and Mu'awiya ibn Abi Sufyan proposed to her. She went to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ to seek his counsel about the two of them.
32.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Pindahlah ke rumah Ibnu Umm Maktum." Beliau juga menyebutkan Umm Kulthum. Beliau bersabda: "Tidak — Umm Kulthum banyak dikunjungi orang. Pindahlah ke tempat Abdullah bin Umm Maktum, karena ia buta." Maka ia pindah ke tempat Abdullah dan menyelesaikan masa iddahnya bersamanya. Kemudian Abu Jahm dan Mu'awiyah bin Abi Sufyan melamarnya. Ia pergi kepada Rasulullah ﷺ untuk meminta nasihat tentang keduanya.

33.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ directed her to Usama ibn Zayd. Marwan then sent Qabisa ibn Dhu'ayb to ask her about this hadith. She narrated it to him, and Marwan said: "We have not heard this hadith except from a woman — we will stick to the established practice we found the people upon." When this reached Fatima, she said: "Between me and you is the Quran. Allah the Almighty says: 'Do not expel them from their homes, nor should they leave...'"
33.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengarahkannya kepada Usamah bin Zaid. Marwan kemudian mengutus Qabishah bin Dzu'ayb untuk bertanya kepadanya tentang hadits ini. Ia menceritakannya, dan Marwan berkata: "Kami tidak pernah mendengar hadits ini kecuali dari seorang wanita — kami akan berpegang pada kebiasaan yang kami temukan orang-orang menjalankannya." Ketika ini sampai kepada Fatimah, ia berkata: "Antara aku dan kalian adalah Al-Quran. Allah 'Azza wa Jalla berfirman: 'Janganlah kalian mengusir mereka dari rumah-rumah mereka, dan janganlah mereka keluar...'"

34.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ did not grant her accommodation or maintenance. Umar ibn al-Khattab said: "We will not abandon the Book of Allah the Almighty and the Sunnah of His Prophet ﷺ for the statement of a woman — perhaps she forgot." Amir said: "She also narrated to me that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ordered her to spend her waiting period in the house of Ibn Umm Maktum."
34.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ tidak memberikannya tempat tinggal maupun nafkah. Umar bin al-Khattab berkata: "Kami tidak akan meninggalkan Kitab Allah 'Azza wa Jalla dan Sunnah Nabi-Nya ﷺ karena perkataan seorang wanita — mungkin ia lupa." Amir berkata: "Ia juga menceritakan kepadaku bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkannya untuk menjalani masa iddah di rumah Ibnu Umm Maktum."

35.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that she cited the verse: "O Prophet, when you divorce women, divorce them at their waiting periods... do not expel them from their homes, nor should they leave, unless they have committed a clear indecency... Perhaps Allah will bring about something after that." She then cited: "When they have reached the end of their term, then either retain them with kindness or release them with kindness." She said: "By Allah, Allah did not mention any restraint after the third divorce — and nor did the Messenger of Allah ﷺ command me otherwise."
35.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menyebutkan ayat: "Wahai Nabi, apabila kamu menceraikan para istri, ceraikanlah mereka pada masa idah mereka... janganlah kamu keluarkan mereka dari rumah-rumah mereka, dan janganlah mereka keluar, kecuali jika mereka melakukan perbuatan keji yang nyata... Mudah-mudahan Allah mengadakan sesuatu hal yang baru setelah itu." Ia kemudian menyebutkan: "Apabila mereka telah mendekati akhir idah mereka, maka rujuklah mereka dengan baik atau lepaskanlah mereka dengan baik." Ia berkata: "Demi Allah, Allah tidak menyebutkan penahanan setelah talak tiga — dan Rasulullah ﷺ pun tidak memerintahkanku selain itu."

36.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that she brought her matter of maintenance to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He did not grant her accommodation or maintenance, and said: "O daughter of the family of Qays, accommodation and maintenance are only for a woman over whom her husband has the right to take back."
36.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia membawa perkaranya tentang nafkah kepada Rasulullah ﷺ. Beliau tidak memberikannya tempat tinggal maupun nafkah, dan bersabda: "Wahai putri keluarga Qays, tempat tinggal dan nafkah hanya untuk wanita yang suaminya memiliki hak untuk merujuknya."

37.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that she sought a ruling from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about leaving her home. He ordered her to move to the house of Ibn Umm Maktum, the blind man. Marwan refused to accept Fatima's narration about a divorced woman leaving her home, and Urwa claimed that Aisha also rejected Fatima bint Qays's narration on this matter.
37.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia meminta fatwa kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang meninggalkan rumahnya. Beliau memerintahkannya untuk pindah ke rumah Ibnu Umm Maktum yang buta. Marwan menolak menerima riwayat Fatimah tentang seorang wanita yang diceraikan boleh meninggalkan rumahnya, dan Urwah mengklaim bahwa Aisyah juga menolak riwayat Fatimah binti Qays dalam masalah ini.

38.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered upon her. She said: "Her husband had divorced her with a final divorce." She said: "I took my dispute with him to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ regarding accommodation and maintenance. He did not grant me accommodation or maintenance, and ordered me to spend my waiting period in the house of Ibn Umm Maktum."
38.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ masuk menemuinya. Ia berkata: "Suaminya menceraikannya dengan talak yang tidak bisa dirujuk." Ia berkata: "Aku membawa perselisihanku dengannya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ mengenai tempat tinggal dan nafkah. Beliau tidak memberikanku tempat tinggal maupun nafkah, dan memerintahkanku untuk menjalani masa iddah di rumah Ibnu Umm Maktum."

39.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said to her during her waiting period: "Do not marry until you inform me."
39.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda kepadanya selama masa iddahnya: "Jangan menikah sampai kamu memberitahuku."

40.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that her husband divorced her with a triple divorce. She went to the Prophet ﷺ and he did not grant her accommodation or maintenance. He said: "Accommodation and maintenance are only for the one whose husband has the right to take her back." And he ordered her to spend her waiting period with Ibn Umm Maktum, the blind man.
40.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa suaminya menceraikannya dengan talak tiga. Ia pergi kepada Nabi ﷺ dan beliau tidak memberikannya tempat tinggal maupun nafkah. Beliau bersabda: "Tempat tinggal dan nafkah hanya untuk orang yang suaminya memiliki hak untuk merujuknya." Dan beliau memerintahkannya untuk menjalani masa iddah bersama Ibnu Umm Maktum yang buta.

41.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "My husband divorced me with a triple divorce, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ordered me to spend my waiting period in the house of Ibn Umm Maktum."
41.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Suamiku menceraikanku dengan talak tiga, dan Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkanku untuk menjalani masa iddah di rumah Ibnu Umm Maktum."

42.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "My husband divorced me with a triple divorce and I wished to move. I came to the Prophet ﷺ and he said: 'Move to the house of your cousin Amr ibn Umm Maktum and spend your waiting period with him.'"
42.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Suamiku menceraikanku dengan talak tiga dan aku ingin pindah. Aku datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan beliau bersabda: 'Pindahlah ke rumah sepupumu Amr bin Umm Maktum dan jalani masa iddahmu bersamanya.'"

43.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that she sought a ruling from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about leaving her home, and he ordered her to move to the house of Ibn Umm Maktum the blind man. Marwan refused to accept Fatima's account about a divorced woman leaving her home, and Urwa said that Aisha had also rejected Fatima bint Qays's narration on this.
43.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia meminta fatwa kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang meninggalkan rumahnya, dan beliau memerintahkannya untuk pindah ke rumah Ibnu Umm Maktum yang buta. Marwan menolak menerima riwayat Fatimah tentang seorang wanita yang diceraikan boleh meninggalkan rumahnya, dan Urwah berkata bahwa Aisyah juga telah menolak riwayat Fatimah binti Qays tentang hal ini.

44.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "There is no accommodation or maintenance for a woman upon her husband when he no longer has the right to take her back. Go out and stay with so-and-so." Then he said: "He is visited by men. Rather, stay with Ibn Umm Maktum, for he is blind and cannot see you." Then he said: "Do not marry until I myself marry you off." She said: "A man from Quraysh proposed to me, so I came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ to seek his counsel." He said: "Will you not marry someone better than him?"
44.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak ada tempat tinggal maupun nafkah bagi seorang wanita atas suaminya ketika ia tidak lagi memiliki hak untuk merujuknya. Keluarlah dan tinggallah bersama si fulan." Kemudian beliau bersabda: "Ia dikunjungi laki-laki. Lebih baik tinggallah bersama Ibnu Umm Maktum, karena ia buta dan tidak dapat melihatmu." Kemudian beliau bersabda: "Jangan menikah sampai aku sendiri yang menikahkanmu." Ia berkata: "Seorang laki-laki dari Quraisy melamarku, maka aku datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ untuk meminta nasihatnya." Beliau bersabda: "Tidakkah kamu mau menikah dengan seseorang yang lebih baik darinya?"

45.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) about the encounter with the Dajjal, in which they were asked about the palm trees between Oman and Baysan. They said: "They are fine, they bear fruit every year." He was asked about the Sea of Tiberias and they said: "It is full." He let out a sigh, then sighed again, then sighed a third time. Then he swore: "If I could leave this place where I am, I would not leave a single piece of land without treading upon it — except Taybah, for I have no authority over it." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ then said: "This is where my joy reached its limit" — three times — "for Taybah is Medina, and Allah the Almighty has surrounded it with angels."
45.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) tentang pertemuan dengan Dajjal, di mana mereka ditanya tentang pohon kurma antara Oman dan Baysan. Mereka berkata: "Mereka baik-baik saja, berbuah setiap tahun." Ia ditanya tentang Danau Tiberias dan mereka berkata: "Penuh." Ia menghela nafas, kemudian menghela nafas lagi, kemudian menghela nafas ketiga kalinya. Kemudian ia bersumpah: "Jika aku bisa meninggalkan tempat ini, aku tidak akan meninggalkan satu pun daratan tanpa menginjaknya — kecuali Taybah, karena aku tidak memiliki kekuasaan atasnya." Rasulullah ﷺ kemudian bersabda: "Di sinilah kegembiraanku mencapai puncaknya" — tiga kali — "karena Taybah adalah Madinah, dan Allah 'Azza wa Jalla telah mengelilinginya dengan para malaikat."

46.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) about the one-eyed man who was bound in chains. He said: "Who are you?" They said: "We are Arabs." He said: "Has a Prophet been sent among you?" They said: "Yes." He said: "That is better for them." He said: "What has Persia done — has he prevailed over it?" They said: "No." He said: "But he will prevail over it." Then he said: "What of the spring of Zughar?" They said: "It is overflowing." He said: "And the palm trees of Baysan — do they bear fruit?" They said: "Yes, the first fruits are appearing." So he leapt up until it seemed as though he would break free.
46.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) tentang seorang laki-laki bermata satu yang dibelenggu dengan rantai. Ia berkata: "Siapa kalian?" Mereka berkata: "Kami orang Arab." Ia berkata: "Apakah seorang Nabi telah diutus di antara kalian?" Mereka berkata: "Ya." Ia berkata: "Itu lebih baik bagi mereka." Ia berkata: "Apa yang terjadi dengan Persia — apakah beliau telah menaklukkannya?" Mereka berkata: "Tidak." Ia berkata: "Tapi beliau akan menaklukkannya." Kemudian ia berkata: "Bagaimana mata air Zughar?" Mereka berkata: "Ia meluap." Ia berkata: "Dan pohon kurma Baysan — apakah berbuah?" Mereka berkata: "Ya, buah pertamanya mulai muncul." Maka ia melompat seolah-olah akan melepaskan diri.

47.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said to a Companion's wife: "I see that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ appears to be angry." She replied: "Yes, have you not heard what he said?" She said: "What did he say?" She said: "He said: 'When evil spreads openly in the land and the people do not forbid it from one another, Allah the Almighty sends His punishment upon the people of the land.'" She said: "I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, and among them are righteous people?' He said: 'Yes, and among them are righteous people who are struck by what strikes the people. Then Allah the Almighty takes them to His forgiveness and mercy.'"
47.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata kepada istri seorang sahabat: "Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ tampak marah." Ia menjawab: "Ya, apakah kamu tidak mendengar apa yang beliau katakan?" Ia berkata: "Apa yang beliau katakan?" Ia berkata: "Beliau bersabda: 'Ketika kejahatan menyebar secara terang-terangan di muka bumi dan manusia tidak saling mencegahnya, Allah 'Azza wa Jalla menurunkan azab-Nya kepada penduduk bumi itu.'" Ia berkata: "Aku berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, padahal di antara mereka ada orang-orang yang saleh?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, di antara mereka ada orang-orang saleh yang terkena apa yang menimpa manusia. Kemudian Allah 'Azza wa Jalla membawa mereka kepada ampunan dan rahmat-Nya.'"

48.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman of the Companions (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man asked her: "Do you have a husband?" She said: "Yes." He asked: "Where do you stand with him?" She said: "I fall short of serving him only when I am unable." He said: "Look to where you stand with him, for he is your Paradise and your Fire."
48.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepadanya: "Apakah kamu punya suami?" Ia berkata: "Ya." Ia bertanya: "Bagaimana sikapmu kepadanya?" Ia berkata: "Aku tidak pernah kurang dalam melayaninya kecuali ketika aku tidak mampu." Ia berkata: "Perhatikanlah sikapmu kepadanya, karena ia adalah surga dan nerakamu."

49.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Malik al-Bahziyya (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The best of people in times of tribulation is a man who withdraws with his wealth, worshipping his Lord and fulfilling His rights, and a man who takes hold of his horse's reins in the path of Allah, instilling fear in the enemy and being instilled with fear by them."
49.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Malik al-Bahziyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Sebaik-baik manusia di masa fitnah adalah seorang laki-laki yang mengasingkan diri dengan hartanya, beribadah kepada Tuhannya dan menunaikan hak-Nya, dan seorang laki-laki yang memegang kendali kudanya di jalan Allah, menakuti musuh dan ditakuti oleh mereka."

50.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hakim bint al-Zubayr (may Allah be pleased with her) that she narrated to him that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ entered upon Dubaa'a bint al-Zubayr and took a bite from a piece of meat that was with her. He then prayed and did not perform ablution from that.
50.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hakim binti al-Zubayr (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menceritakan kepadanya bahwa Nabi Allah ﷺ masuk menemui Dhuba'ah binti al-Zubayr dan mengambil gigitan dari sepotong daging yang ada padanya. Kemudian beliau shalat dan tidak berwudhu dari itu.
